968 OXGN_INTRMTNT_ADMSN_CD OXGN_INTRMTNT_ADMSN_CD O0110C3A Therapies: Oxygen - Intermittent (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received intermittent oxygen therapy days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
